SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BHARAT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINITFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RECEIVED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RUSSELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, BHARAT $2,629.99 PRINCIPAL, $51.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,681.49, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAR-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BHARAT
